error_signature: images not displayed in email content
title: Images not displayed in Gmail node email
symptom: When sending an email via the Gmail node, images referenced by local file paths do not appear in the email content.
applies_when: Images referenced by local file paths
not_this_if: Images are hosted online and accessible via URL
root_cause: Email clients cannot access local file paths for images, leading to empty areas where images should be displayed. This is a common issue when images are not embedded or hosted online.
fix_steps: Convert the image to Base64 format
Embed the Base64 image in the HTML using the format ''
agent_instruction: Convert images to Base64 and embed them directly in the HTML for the email.
safety_notes: Large images may increase email size significantly.
